import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import math

class DKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills
        x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.lstm(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_GRU(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills
        x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_Concat(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.lstm(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_Concat_GRU(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_Concat_GRU_LN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        self.ln1 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim * 2)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.ln2 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.ln1(x)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.ln2(h)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_SkillEmb(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, next_skills):
        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills
        x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.lstm(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        
        next_skill_embeds = self.skill_emb(next_skills)
        
        out = self.out(torch.cat([h, next_skill_embeds], dim=-1)).squeeze(-1)
        return out

class SAKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, num_heads=8, dropout=0.2, max_len=20000):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed_dim = embed_dim
        
        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.pos_emb = nn.Embedding(max_len, embed_dim)
        
        self.attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim, num_heads, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)
        
        self.layer_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)
        self.layer_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)
        
        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim)
        )
        
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.pred = nn.Linear(embed_dim, 1)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, next_skills):
        device = skill_ids.device
        seq_len = skill_ids.size(1)
        
        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills
        v = self.interaction_emb(interactions)
        
        positions = torch.arange(seq_len, device=device).unsqueeze(0)
        v = v + self.pos_emb(positions)
        
        q = self.skill_emb(next_skills)
        
        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(seq_len, seq_len, device=device), diagonal=1).bool()
        
        attn_out, _ = self.attention(q, v, v, attn_mask=mask)
        
        x = self.layer_norm1(q + self.dropout(attn_out))
        ffn_out = self.ffn(x)
        x = self.layer_norm2(x + self.dropout(ffn_out))
        
        out = self.pred(x).squeeze(-1)
        return out
